sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110924" key="file/codos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλέξοδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n110924.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of going out</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gadding about,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg005:4:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Axiop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.4</biblScope> </bibl> codd. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
